mentions.text:
I feel like Soitec ( $SLOIF ) is a free 2-3x if people have the patience to wait a year? 

They're a genuine monopoly over CPO for substrates. 

Lot of folks looking at Shin-Etsu but they're just licensing Soitec's stuff.

It's not a current materials bottleneck like $AXTI, but a demand one (they have none right now since CPO hasn't scaled up).

But we all know it's coming later in 2027 -> 2028. 

Main thing is opportunity cost, but just a matter of when markets want to frontrun it. Still better than your index returns imo?
